snippet.title: POGARU (2021) NEW Released Full Hindi Dubbed Movie | Dhruva Sarja, Rashmika Mandanna, Kai Greene
snippet.description:
Dhruva Sarja is unstoppable in his path as he has garnered the support and affection of the general public by fighting against the injustice that comes their way. However, one incident that occurs in his childhood, changes his life forever. How exactly he overcomes that incident forms the rest of the story.

Censor Cerification Number - VIL/2/93/2021- MUM
Movie (Hindi Dubbed):- Pogaru
Original Movie Name:- Pogaru (In Kannada)
Starcast: Dhruva Sarja, Rashmika Mandanna, Bullet Prakash, Kai Greene
Producer: B. K. Gangadhar  
Music: V. Harikrishna, Chandan Shetty 
Director: Nanda Kishore

snippet.title: Coronavirus India Update: ωνΧωξΜων░ωξΜωνρων╛ ωνΧωξΑ ωνοωξΓων╕ων░ωξΑ ων╡ωξΘων╡ ωνΧωξΘ ωνυων╛ων░ωξΘ ωνχωξΘωνΓ ωνυωννων╛ωννωξΘ ων╣ωξΒωνΠ ωνφων╛ων╡ωξΒωνΧ ων╣ωξΜ ωνΩωνΙωνΓ Dr. Trupti Gilada|
snippet.description:
ωνΧωξΜων░ωξΜωνρων╛ (Corona) ωνΧωξΑ ωνοωξΓων╕ων░ωξΑ ων▓ων╣ων░ ων╕ωξΘ ωνοωξΘων╢ ωνεωξΓωνζ ων░ων╣ων╛ ων╣ωξΙ, ων╣ωξΘων▓ωξΞωνξ ων╡ωξΚων░ων┐ωνψων░ωξΞων╕ (Health Warriors) ωνφωξΑ ωνΘων╕ ωνχων╣ων╛ωνχων╛ων░ωξΑ ωνχωξΘωνΓ ωνςωξΓων░ωξΑ ωνΧωξΜων╢ων┐ων╢ ωνΧων░ ων░ων╣ωξΘ ων╣ωξΙωνΓ ωνΧων┐ ωνχων░ωξΑωνεωξΜωνΓ ωνΧωξΜ ωνυωνγων╛ωνψων╛ ωνεων╛ ων╕ωνΧωξΘ. ωνκωξΚ ωννωξΔωνςωξΞωννων┐ ωνΩων┐ων▓ων╛ωνκων╛, ωνΠωνΧ ωνΘωνρωξΞωντωξΘωνΧωξΞων╢ων╕ ωνκων┐ων╕ωξΑωνε ωντων┐ωνεων┐ων╢ων┐ωνψωνρ ων╣ωξΙωνΓ, ωνΚωνρωνΧωξΑ ωνΖωνςωξΑων▓ ων╣ωξΙ ωνΧων┐ ων╕ωνφωξΑ ωνΧωξΜ ωνχων╛ων╕ωξΞωνΧ ωνεων░ωξΓων░ ωνςων╣ωνρωνρων╛ ωνγων╛ων╣ων┐ωνΠ ωνΦων░ ωνΧωξΜων░ωξΜωνρων╛ ωνΧωξΘ ων╕ωνφωξΑ ωνρων┐ωνψωνχωξΜωνΓ ωνΧων╛ ωνςων╛ων▓ωνρ ωνΧων░ωνρων╛ ωνγων╛ων╣ων┐ωνΠ. 
 
#Mumbai #Coronavirus #India

ωνΧωξΞων╡ων┐ωνΓωνθ ων╣ων┐ωνΓωνοωξΑ ωνΧωξΑ ων╕ωξΞων╡ωννωνΓωννωξΞων░ ωνςωννωξΞων░ωνΧων╛ων░ων┐ωννων╛ ωνΧων╛ ων╕ων╛ωνξ ωνοωξΑωνεων┐ωνΠ. ων╣ωνχων╛ων░ωξΘ ωνχωξΘωνΓωνυων░ ωνυωνρων┐ωνΠ: https://bit.ly/2mE6B8P

ωνΧων╛ωνιωνχων╛ωνκωξΝωνΓ ωνΚωνςωννωξΞωνψωνΧων╛ωνΧων╛ ωξσ ωνεων┐ων▓ωξΞων▓ων╛ωνχων╛ ωνρων┐ων╖ωξΘωνπων╛ωνεωξΞωνηων╛ ων▓ων╛ωνΩωξΞωνρωξΘ ωνφωνΠωνΧωξΜ ωνδ ωξνων╕ωξΜωνχωνυων╛ων░ ωνΧων╛ωνιωνχων╛ωνκωξΝωνΓ, ωνφωνΧωξΞωννωνςωξΒων░ ων░ ων▓ων▓ων┐ωννωνςωξΒων░ ωνεων┐ων▓ωξΞων▓ων╛ωνΧων╛ ωνςωξΞων░ωνχωξΒωνΨ ωνεων┐ων▓ωξΞων▓ων╛ ωνΖωνπων┐ωνΧων╛ων░ωξΑωνΧωξΜ ωνυωξΙωνιωνΧων▓ωξΘ ωνΖωννωξΞωνψων╛ων╡ων╢ωξΞωνψωνΧωνυων╛ων╣ωξΘωνΧωνΧων╛ ων╕ωξΘων╡ων╛ ωνυωνρωξΞωνο ωνΩων░ωξΞωνρωξΘ, ωνΨων╛ωνοωξΞωνψωνςωνοων╛ων░ωξΞωνξ ων░ ωνΦων╖ωνπωξΑ ωνςων╕ων▓ωνυων╛ων╣ωξΘωνΧωνΧων╛ ωνΖων░ωξΒ ωνςων╕ων▓ ωνυωνρωξΞωνο ωνΩων░ωξΞωνρωξΘ ωνρων┐ων░ωξΞωνμωνψ ωνΩων░ωξΘωνΧωξΜ ων╕ωξΞων░ωξΜωννων▓ωξΘ ωνυωννων╛ωνΠωξν  ων╡ωξΙων╢ων╛ωνΨ ωξπωξυ ωνΩωννωξΘωνοωξΘωνΨων┐ ων╕ων╛ων░ωξΞων╡ωνεωνρων┐ωνΧ ων░ ωνρων┐ωνεωξΑ ωνψων╛ωννων╛ωνψων╛ωνν ωνςωνρων┐ ωνυωνρωξΞωνο ωνΩων░ωξΞωνρωξΘ ων╕ωξΞων░ωξΜωννωνΧωξΜ ωνφωνρων╛ωνΘ ωνδ ωξν ων╣ωξΜωνθων▓ ωννωνξων╛ ων░ωξΘων╖ωξΞωνθωξΒων░ωξΘωνρωξΞωνθων▓ωξΘ ωνςωνρων┐ ωνθωξΘωνΧ ωνΖων╡ωξΘ ων╕ωξΘων╡ων╛ ωνχων╛ωννωξΞων░ ωνοων┐ωνρ ωνςων╛ωνΚωνρωξΘωνδωνρωξΞ ωξν

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || ωνχωξΘων░ωξΑ ωνυων╛ων╕ωξΞων╕ωξΙ || Ep-699 || April-20-2021|| By Media Hub Official Channel
snippet.description:
Basmati is on a mission to transform the village. Kailo and Chulthey are up to mischief. How will everyone else react to what's going on? Watch all this and more in today's episode

Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta

snippet.title: India overwhelmed by worldέΑβs worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal MishraέΑβs Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin

haaye bada

snippet.title: Tamil Superstar VIJAY Action Hindi Dubbed Movie | Dum 2 - ωνοωνχ 2 | Jyothika, Vivek
snippet.description: The movie story deals with Thirumalai a mechanic who lives with his friends and parents in Puthupet, Chennai. On the occasion of 2002 New Year's Eve, he meets Swetha and falls in love with her. But due to her arrogant behavior, Thirumalai is beat up by her goons. After realizing his good nature, she reciprocates his feelings. This is opposed by her father Ashok, who calls a thug named Arasu, who has a reputation of being a big mafia crime boss in Chennai. Hence, Thirumalai fights with them and this makes Arasu realize all of his misbehavior. In the end, Arasu changes his mind about the match, and Ashok also realizes his mistakes. He accepts their love finally, and both reunite with each other.

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Katai Uslai (Samaya)
snippet.description:
Bipul Chettri - Vocals, Acoustic Guitar, Harmonica

Written, composed and arranged by Bipul Chettri.
Recorded, mixed and mastered by Anindo Bose at Plug 'N' Play Studios.
Cover artwork and design by Manohar Rai.

Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

Note: You can purchase the song at this brand new platform for independent Nepali music.
https://noodlerex.com.np/songs/350/

This is a message that the listener is being asked to carry to a lover left behind in the past. From the very first lines, one senses the senderέΑβs yearning for closure, forgiveness and absolution. A more perceptive ear will pick up the desperation of a man who wishes he could go back in time and set things right, for he has just realised that there can be no one else quite like her. But, it is the resignation with which the words are sung that reveal that he is aware that this is but just a fantasy. While the past maybe be exactly where he left it, everything and everyone else have moved on. Performed with the typical precipitous western classical-styled finger-picking that Bipul has now come to be associated with, the bittersweet song comes to an end with the wail of a Dylanesque harmonica solo.

(Liner Notes by Nima D.T. Namchu)

All Rights Reserved by Bipul Chettri. 2021.

ωνξωξΑ...ωνΦων░ ωννωνφωξΑ ωνΠωνΓωνθωξΞων░ωξΑ ων╣ωξΜωννωξΑ ων╣ωξΙ ωνΧων╣ων╛ωνρωξΑ ωνΧωξΘ ων╣ωξΑων░ωξΜ ωνΧωξΑωξν ωνεωξΑ ων╣ων╛ωνΓ, ωνψων╣ωξΑ ων╣ωξΙωνΓ ων╣ωνχων╛ων░ωξΘ ωνΖων╕ων▓ωξΑ ων╣ωξΑων░ωξΜωξν snippet.title: The Act At The Railway Station | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.title: ων▓ωξΘωνθωξΘων╕ωξΞωνθ ωνρωνΙ ων░ων┐ων▓ωξΑωνεων╝ ωνχωξΓων╡ωξΑ " ων░ωνΧωξΞων╖ωνΧ "ων╣ων┐ωνΓωνοωξΑ ωνκωνυ ωνχωξΘωνΓ |ωνρωνΙ ων╕ων╛ωνΚωνξ ωνΠωνΧωξΞων╢ωνρ ωνχωξΓων╡ωξΑ ων╣ων┐ωνΓωνοωξΑ ωνχωξΘωνΓ | ων╕ωξΝωνΓωνοων░ωξΞωνψων╛, ωνυωξΞων░ων╣ωξΞωνχων╛ωνρωνΓωνοωνχ
snippet.description:
Movie Title: Main Hoon Rakshak (Taraka Ramudu) - South Dubbed Hindi Movies 2014 Full Movie
Genre: Hindi Action Drama Movie
Starcast: Srikant, Saundarya, Brahmanandam
Director: RV Uday Kumar
Ramu (Srikanth) Ek sidha sadha ladka hain. Use padhnaa likhna nahi aata. Wo gaon me akela rehta hain aur logo ke kamo me help karta rehta hain. Usi gaon me me Simran (Soundarya) Officer ban ke aati hain. Wo bahot imandar officer hain. Aur gaon me kisike ghar me rent se rehti hain.

Rangnath jise gaav ke log Bade sahib ke naam se jaante hain wo gaav ke mukhiya hain. Aur unka saala Naidu jiske naam se gaon ke log darte hain wo gaon ke kaamo me lagne wala paisa khata hain. Aur logo pe julm karte rehta hain.

Ramu Aur Simran ki mulakat ek bus me hoti hain. Usi bas me kuchh gunde simaran ko pareshan karte hain. Ramu unn gunde ko maarta hain aur dono me pehchan ho jati hain.

Simran Naidu ke kaamo ka pardafash karne me lag jati hain aur uska jeena mushkil kar deti hain. Naidu Simaran ka ghar khali karva deta hain aur Ramu Simaran ko help karke uske ghar me rehne lagte hain.

Simran gaon ke kaam imandari se karna chahti hain par Naidu use pareshan karte rehta hain. Ek din Simaran Naidu ke kuchh logo ko arrest karvati hain. Phir wahi log simaran ke sath jabardasti karte hain aur Ramu unn logo ko markar Simran ko bachata hain.

Ek Din Simaran ki maa use milane aa jati hain aur Ramu ke bare me use pata chal jata hain ki wo Rangnath ka beta hain. Rangnath ko baat pata chal jati hain aur wo bahot khush ho jata hain Aur Ramu Ko prince bana deta hain par Naidu use kisi tareeke se maarna chahta hain par Ramu bachh jata hain.

Ramu, Naidu aur usake aadmiyo ke beech ladai hoti hai aur burai pe achchai ki jeet hoti hai.

snippet.title: ων╕ων┐ωνχων╛ωνρωξΞωνν ωνΧωνξων╛ ωξν Simanta Katha - Herne Katha EP54 ωξν ων╣ωξΘων░ωξΞωνρωξΘ ωνΧωνξων╛
snippet.description:
ωνρωξΘωνςων╛ων▓  ων░ ωνφων╛ων░ωννωνΧωξΜ ωνςωξΓων░ωξΞων╡ωξΑ ων╕ων┐ωνχων╛ωνρων╛ωνχων╛ ωνκων╛ωνΒωνκων╛ωνΒωνΧων╛ωνΒωνκων╛ ωνδων┐ωνγωξΜων▓ωξΞωνοωξΙ ωνυωνΩωξΞωνδ  ωνχωξΘωνγωξΑ ωνρωνοωξΑ ωξν ωνχωξΘωνγωξΑ ωνρωνοωξΑωνΧων╛ωξΘ ωναωξΒωνχων╛ωνΚων░ων╛ωξΘ ων▓ων╣ων░ωξΜ ωνςωνδωξΞωνψων╛ωνΚωνΒωνοωξΙ ων╕ων┐ωνχων╛ωνρων╛ωνΧων╛ ωνχων╛ωνρωξΞωνδωξΘων╣ων░ωξΒ ωνΗωνΚωνεων╛ωνΚ ωνΩων░ωξΞωνδωνρωξΞ ωξν ωνΘων▓ων╛ωνχωνΧωξΜ ων╕ων┐ωνχων╛ωνρωξΞωνν ωνΩων╛ωνΚωνΒωνΧων╛ ωνχων╛ωνρωξΞωνδωξΘων╣ων░ωξΒ ωναωξΜωνκων╛ ωνΨωνγωξΞωνγωνκ  ων▓ων┐ωνΠων░ ων╕ωξΝωνοων╛ ωνΩων░ωξΞωνρ ωνφων╛ων░ωννωνΧωξΜ ωνρωνΧωξΞων╕ων▓ωνυων╛ων░ωξΑ ων╣ων╛ωνθ ωνζων░ωξΞωνοων╛ ων░ων╣ωξΘωνδωνρωξΞ ωξν ων╣ων╛ωνθωνυων╛ωνθ  ωντων░ωξΞωνΧων┐ων░ων╣ωξΘωνΧων╛ ωναωξΜωνκωνγωνλωξΑων╣ων░ωξΒων▓ων╛ωνΙ  ων╣ων╛ωνχωξΑων▓ωξΘ ωνχωξΘωνγωξΑ ωνυωνΩων░ωνχων╛ ωνφωξΘωνθωξΞωνψωξΝωνΓ ωξν ων░ ωνΚωνρωξΑων╣ων░ωξΒων╕ωνΒωνΩωξΙ ωνΧων┐ωνρων╛ων░ωξΙ ωνΧων┐ωνρων╛ων░ ωνΚωνΧων╛ων▓ωξΜ ων▓ων╛ωνΩωξΞωνψωξΝωνΓ ωξν 

#HerneKatha #SimantaKatha

Stories of people and villages in the mountains of Eastern Nepal bordering India.


Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
ΏθΤΒέΑΞέβΓΎ╕ΠΏθΤΒέΑΞέβΓΎ╕ΠΏθΤΒέΑΞέβΓΎ╕Π Become our Patron ΏθΤΒέΑΞέβΓΎ╕ΠΏθΤΒέΑΞέβΓΎ╕ΠΏθΤΒέΑΞέβΓΎ╕Π
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


ΏθΣΑΏθΣΑΏθΣΑ Herne Katha ΏθΣΑΏθΣΑΏθΣΑ
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


ΏθγΑΏθγΑΏθγΑ Herne  Katha Team ΏθγΑΏθγΑΏθγΑ

ΏθΟυ Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

ΏθΣσ Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

ΏθΟξ Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

ΏθΨξ Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

ΏθΟχ Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

ΏθΥζ Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

ΏθΣΞΏθΠ╝ Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

έεΚΎ╕Π Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

ΏθγΞ Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


ΏθΣΞΏθΣΞΏθΣΞ Follow Herne Katha ΏθΣΞΏθΣΞΏθΣΞ
ΏθΣΚ IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
ΏθΣΚ Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
ΏθΣΚ Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
ΏθΣΚ Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
ΏθΣΚ Website: https://hernekatha.com
ΏθΣΚ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

ΏθΤΝΏθΤΝΏθΤΝ Share your Story ΏθΤΝΏθΤΝΏθΤΝ 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

ΏθΤ▓ΏθΤ▓ΏθΤ▓ For Advertisers ΏθΤ▓ΏθΤ▓ΏθΤ▓ 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


ΏθΟ╢ΏθΟ╢ΏθΟ╢ For Singers and Musicians ΏθΟ╢ΏθΟ╢ΏθΟ╢ 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


ΏθΟρΏθΟρΏθΟρ For all Creatives ΏθΟρΏθΟρΏθΟρ
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


ΏθαλΏθαλΏθαλ Sorry ΏθαλΏθαλΏθαλ 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Ultaa Paailaa [Official Lyrical Video Release]
snippet.description:
Official lyrical video for Sajjan Raj Vaidya's 'Ultaa Paailaa'.

'Ultaa Paailaa' is a story of circumstance. It is a moment of realization of the inevitable end of love you are forced to step away from. With it, you forever carry the weight of acceptance of what could have been but did not. A unity created and separated by time.

Written | Performed | Produced by:
Sajjan Raj Vaidya

Artwork by: Kailash Subedi (@kailashs)

snippet.description:
ωνρωνΙ ωνοων┐ων▓ωξΞων▓ωξΑ. ωνοων┐ων▓ωξΞων▓ωξΑ ωνΧωξΘ ωνοων░ων┐ωνψων╛ωνΩωνΓωνε ωνοων┐ων▓ωξΞων▓ωξΑ ωνΩωξΘωνθ ωνςων░ ωνεων┐ων╕ ωνΧωνςων▓ ωνρωξΘ ωνςωξΒων▓ων┐ων╕ ωνςων┐ωνΧωξΘωνθ ωνςων░ ωνςωξΒων▓ων┐ων╕ (Police) ωνΧωξΘ ων╕ων╛ωνξ ωνυωνοωννωνχωξΑωνεωξΑ ωνΧωξΑ ωνξωξΑ, ωνΚων╕ωνχωξΘωνΓ ωνςωννων┐ ωνςωνΓωνΧωνε ωνοωννωξΞωννων╛ ωνΦων░ ωνςωννωξΞωνρωξΑ ωνΧωξΜ ωνΩων┐ων░ωντωξΞωννων╛ων░ ωνΧων┐ωνψων╛ ωνΩωνψων╛ ων╣ωξΙ. ωνςωξΒων▓ων┐ων╕ ωνρωξΘ ωνοωξΜωνρωξΜωνΓ ωνςων░ ων╕ωξΘωνΧωξΞων╢ωνρ ωνΦων░ ωνεωξΜωξε ωνοων┐ωνΠ ων╣ωξΙωνΓ. ωνΗων░ωξΜωνςων┐ωνψωξΜωνΓ ωνΧωξΘ ωνΨων┐ων▓ων╛ωντ IPC ωνΧωξΑ ωνπων╛ων░ων╛ 188, 34, 51B, DDMA, 353 ωνΦων░ 186 ωννων╣ωνν ωνΧωξΘων╕ ωνοων░ωξΞωνε ωνΧων┐ωνψων╛ ων╣ωξΙ.

ωνεων╛ωνΓωνγ ωνχωξΘωνΓ ωνςωννων╛ ωνγων▓ων╛ ων╣ωξΙ ωνΧων┐ ωνςωννων┐ ωνςωνΓωνΧωνε ωνοωννωξΞωννων╛ ωνΧωξΘ ων╕ων╛ωνξ ωνΚων╕ωνΧωξΑ ωνςωννωξΞωνρωξΑ ωνΗωνφων╛ ωνΩωξΒωνςωξΞωννων╛, ωνςωνθωξΘων▓ ωνρωνΩων░ ωνΖωνςωνρωξΘ ωναων░ ων╕ωξΘ ωναωξΓωνχωνρωξΘ ωνΧωξΘ ων▓ων┐ωνΠ ωνρων┐ωνΧων▓ωξΘ ωνξωξΘ. ωνςωννων┐ ωνςωνΓωνΧωνε ωνοωννωξΞωννων╛ ωνςωξΞων░ων╛ωνΘων╡ωξΘωνθ ωνΧωνΓωνςωνρωξΑ ωνχωξΘωνΓ ων╕ωξΘων▓ωξΞων╕ ωνΧωξΑ ωνρωξΝωνΧων░ωξΑ ωνΧων░ωννων╛ ων╣ωξΙ ωνΦων░ ωνςωννωξΞωνρωξΑ UPSC ωνΧωξΑ ωννωξΙωνψων╛ων░ωξΑ ωνΧων░ ων░ων╣ωξΑ ων╣ωξΙ.

ωνοων┐ων▓ωξΞων▓ωξΑ ωνΧωξΘ ωνοων░ων┐ωνψων╛ωνΩωνΓωνε ωνΘων▓ων╛ωνΧωξΘ ωνχωξΘωνΓ ων░ων╡ων┐ων╡ων╛ων░ ωνΧωξΜ ωνΠωνΧ ων╡ωξΞωνψωνΧωξΞωννων┐ ωνΦων░ ωνΚων╕ωνΧωξΑ ωνςωννωξΞωνρωξΑ ωνΧωξΜ ωνχων╛ων╕ωξΞωνΧ ωνρων╣ωξΑωνΓ ωνςων╣ωνρωνρωξΘ ωνςων░ ωνςωξΒων▓ων┐ων╕ ωνρωξΘ ων░ωξΜωνΧων╛ ωνξων╛, ωνεων┐ων╕ ωνςων░ ωνςωξΒων▓ων┐ων╕ωνΧων░ωξΞωνχων┐ωνψωξΜωνΓ ωνΧωξΘ ων╕ων╛ωνξ ωνΠωνΧ ωνΧωνςων▓ ωνρωξΘ ωνυωνοωννωνχωξΑωνεωξΑ ωνΧωξΑ ωνξωξΑ, ωνεων┐ων╕ωνΧωξΘ ωνυων╛ωνο ων╡ωξΞωνψωνΧωξΞωννων┐ ωνΧωξΜ ωνΩων┐ων░ωντωξΞωννων╛ων░ ωνΧων░ ων▓ων┐ωνψων╛ ωνΩωνψων╛. ων╕ωξΜων╢ων▓ ωνχωξΑωνκων┐ωνψων╛ ωνςων░ ων╡ων╛ωνψων░ων▓ ων╣ωξΒωνΠ ων╡ωξΑωνκων┐ωνψωξΜ ωνχωξΘωνΓ ωνςωννων┐-ωνςωννωξΞωνρωξΑ ωνΧωξΜ ωνςωξΒων▓ων┐ων╕ωνΧων░ωξΞωνχων┐ωνψωξΜωνΓ ων╕ωξΘ ων╕ων╛ωνξ ωνυωνοωννωνχωξΑωνεωξΑ ωνΧων░ωννωξΘ ων╣ωξΒωνΠ ωνοωξΘωνΨων╛ ωνεων╛ ων╕ωνΧωννων╛ ων╣ωξΙ.

snippet.title: MADHANYA - Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar | Asees Kaur |Lijo-DJ Chetas| Anshul Garg | Wedding Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Madhanya by Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur featuring Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar. 


Singer: Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur
Music: Lijo George & Dj Chetas
Lyrics: Kumaar
Song Produced by Lijo George
Mixed and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Assistant engineer: Pukhraj
Vocals recorded at Soundideaz & Click Studios
Recording Engineers : Kittu & Rupak
Featuring: Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Co - Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Choreographer - Sahil Sharma 
Assistant Choreographer - Rajat 
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
Styled by - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Jib operator - Manish Arora
Line producer  - RS films and production 
Makeup - Rajan Passi
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Madhanya Lyrics : 

Beetein saare mausam
Babul tere ghar mein
Ab chale pav mere
Piya ke shehar mein (2)

Ho Tune Vidayiyan kaise
Likhi Marjaaniyan
Kaise bataye O Rabba
Sahi naiyon jaaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye o mere babula teriyan
Mithiyan yaadan
Mere peeche peeche auniyan haaye
Haaye o mere babula Meriya
Hun gudiyan
Kol tere reh jaaniyan haaye

Kuch bhi nahi hai tere
Kadmon se aage (2)
Tujhse jo baandhe maine
Tootenge na dhaage (2)

Haath mera thaama tune
Teri Meherbaaniyan
Mere naam ab se teri
Saari Pareshaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye




#Madhanya #RahulVaidya #DishaParmar

snippet.title: Strange Riddle Behind The Little One | C.I.D | ων╕ωξΑωνΗωνΙωνκωξΑ | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

An Incident of a little one has created an enigma around CID Team. While searching for the family members, they relate the story with problematic twists and turns. Who is this child? Where did she come from? What is the mystery of her family? Will Team CID be able to solve this case and find the Puzzle? Watch now, To know more.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of έΑΥ Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments belowέΑο

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

ων░ωνγωνρων╛ ωνΗων░ωξΞωνθ ωνΠωνμωξΞωνκ ωνχων┐ωνκων┐ωνψων╛ ωνςωξΞων░ων╛.ων▓ων┐.ωνοωξΞων╡ων╛ων░ων╛ ων╕ωνΓωνγων╛ων▓ων┐ωνν ων╕ωνςωξΞωννων░ωνΓωνΩωξΑ ων╕ωνΓων╕ων╛ων░ (saptarangisansar.com)

ων╕ωξΓωνγωνρων╛ ωννωνξων╛ ωνςωξΞων░ων╕ων╛ων░ωνμ ων╡ων┐ωνφων╛ωνΩ ωνοων░ωξΞωννων╛ ωνρωνΓ.: ωξρωξςωξψωξς/ωξοωξφωξφ/ωξοωξφωξχ
ωνςωξΞων░ωξΘων╢ ωνΧων╛ωνΚωνρωξΞων╕ων┐ων▓ ωνρωξΘωνςων╛ων▓ωνχων╛ ων╕ωνχωξΘωνν ων╕ωξΒωνγων┐ωνΧωξΔωνν 

*****έζΑέζΑέζΑ   ων╣ων╛ωνχωξΑων▓ων╛ωνΙ ων╕ωνχωξΞωνζωνρωξΒων╣ωξΜων╕ωξΞ   έζΑέζΑέζΑ*****
έΩα ωννωνςων╛ωνΙων╕ωνΒωνΩ ωνςωνρων┐ ωνΧωξΘων╣ων┐ ωντων░ωνΧ ωνΖωνξων╡ων╛ ωνΖωνρωξΝωνιωξΜ ωνΧων▓ων╛ ωνδ ωνφωνρωξΘ 
έΩα ωνΗωνΧων░ωξΞων╖ωνΧ ωνφων┐ωνκων┐ωνψωξΜων╣ων░ωξΒ ωνδωνρωξΞ ωνφωνρωξΘ 
έΩα ωννωνςων╛ωνΙωνΧωξΜ ων╕ωνχωξΞωνςων░ωξΞωνΧωνχων╛ ωνςωξΞων░ωννων┐ωνφων╛ων╡ων╛ωνρ ων╡ωξΞωνψωνΧωξΞωννων┐ ων╣ωξΒωνρωξΒων╣ωξΒωνρωξΞωνδ ωνφωνρωξΘ 
έΩα ωννωνςων╛ωνΙ ωνΧωξΘων╣ωξΑ ων╡ων┐ων╖ωξΘων╢ ωνΧων╛ων░ωξΞωνψωνΧωξΞων░ωνχ ωνΩων░ωξΞωνοωξΙ ων╣ωξΒωνρωξΒων╣ωξΒωνρωξΞωνδ ωνφωνρωξΘ

snippet.title: Kumkum Bhagya: FINALLY! Abhi MEETS Pragya

snippet.title: Mystifying Glasses | C.I.D | ων╕ωξΑωνΗωνΙωνκωξΑ | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

People are supporting a lady over Domestic Violence and as the offence at the area go down with peace. There an incident takes place where an attack has been violated. People are rushing over the mystery of danger in the locality with the profound mystery of mystic goggles. What is happening around? Where is the Culprit? What is the tragedy behind mysterious specs? Will CID be able to find the Culprit?
Find out, what happens next!

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Z.D. Businessman (2021) New Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | 2021 New South Hindi Dubbed Movies
snippet.description:
Movie Will Premiere At 7:30 PM

The movie follows the inspiring tale of an entrepreneur, Joy Thakolkaaran, who owns a firm named 'Punyalan Agarbathis'. The firm in involved in the production of incense sticks from elephant dung. The first half moves around how it becomes nearly impossible for him to acquire necessary raw material (elephant dung) and when he finally does acquire it devil follows him in the form of a hartal. Struggling between the deadline given by the court and the unexpected hartal, he decides to smuggle the raw material on the day of the hartal. When the RIP followers get wind of this they attack joy and destroy his godown and means of transportation. The rest of the movie revolves around how Joy is pressured with various problems around him and how help comes from the unexpected. The party uses different methods to mentally depreciate Joy. But he overcomes them by his optimistic attitude and his friends and family. In the end of the movie the tag line reads "you can conquer the whole world if you are ready to believe in yourself"

Click to Susbscribe Us: http://goo.gl/Bscph8
